holdings.infoBox: IGTR is an equity ETF with a total of 210 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 15.95%, Samsung Electronics at 10.93%, SK Square at 5.32%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd Participating Preferred at 4.75%, and Delta Electronics at 4.74%.

overview.description: The Innovator Gradient Tactical Rotation Strategy ETF (IGTR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global BMI index. The fund is an actively managed fund that uses a proprietary, rules-based approach to toggle investments among various equity markets and cash. The funds tactical strategy determines investments based on momentum. IGTR was launched on Nov 17, 2022 and is issued by Innovator.
